cards.name: Strike the Head
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by a friendly fighter if the target was a leader or the target's Health characteristic was equal to or greater than the attacker's.

cards.name: Branching Fate
cards.text: Score this immediately after you make an Attack roll that contained 3 or more dice if each result was a different symbol. If you are the underdog, the Attack roll can contain 2 or more dice instead.

cards.name: Perfect Strike
cards.text: Score this immediately after you make an Attack roll if all of the results were successes.

cards.name: Critical Effort
cards.text: Score this immediately after you make an Attack roll if any of the results was a {icon:crit}.

cards.name: Get Stuck In
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was in enemy territory.

cards.name: Strong Start
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain if that fighter was the first fighter slain this combat phase.

cards.name: Keep Choppin'
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if your warband Attacked 3 or more times this combat phase.

cards.name: Fields of Blood
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 4 or more fighters are damaged and/or slain.

cards.name: Go All Out
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 5 or more fighters have Move and/or Charge tokens.

cards.name: On the Edge
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if any enemy fighters are vulnerable.

cards.name: Denial
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if there are no enemy fighters in friendly territory.

cards.name: Annihilation
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if each enemy fighter is slain.

cards.name: Determined Effort
cards.text: Play this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack. If you are the underdog, that weapon has +2 Attack dice for that Attack instead.

cards.name: Twist the Knife
cards.text: Play this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack. That weapon has Grievous for that Attack.

cards.name: Lure of Battle
cards.text: Pick 1 friendly fighter that is within 2 hexes of another fighter. Push the other fighter 1 hex closer to that friendly fighter.

cards.name: Sidestep
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Commanding Stride
cards.text: Push your leader up to 3 hexes. That push must end in a starting hex.

cards.name: Illusory Fighter
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in an empty starting hex in friendly territory. Restricted

cards.name: Wings of War
cards.text: Play this immediately after you pick a fighter to Move. That fighter has +2 Move for that Move.

cards.name: Shields Up!
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Give that fighter a Guard token.

cards.name: Scream of Anger
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Inflict 2 damage on that fighter and then remove 1 of that fighter's Move or Charge tokens.

cards.name: Healing Potion
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Heal that fighter. If you are the underdog, you can roll a Save dice. On a {icon:block} or {icon:crit}, heal that fighter again.

cards.name: Brawler
cards.text: This fighter cannot be Flanked or Surrounded.

cards.name: Hidden Aid
cards.text: Enemy fighters adjacent to this fighter are Flanked.

cards.name: Accurate
cards.text: Strike True: After you make an Attack roll for this fighter, you can immediately re-roll 1 Attack dice in that Attack roll.

cards.name: Great Strength
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous.

cards.name: Deadly Aim
cards.text: This fighter's weapons have Ensnare.

cards.name: Sharpened Points
cards.text: This fighter's weapons have Cleave.

cards.name: Duellist
cards.text: Footwork: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Tough
cards.text: No more than 3 damage can be inflicted on this fighter in the same turn.

cards.name: Great Fortitude
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Health.

cards.name: Keen Eye
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.
